name: webapp-testing
tagline: Official Anthropic skill for driving and testing web apps in a headless browser.
verdict: Mixed bag. It never says when NOT to use it and never defines what the final output should look like or where it goes, leaving results ambiguous. On the plus side, its security footprint is clean with no network or destructive risk.

highlights.summary: Describes its capabilities but does not define a final deliverable format or location.
The description and body never say when NOT to use the skill — no negative triggers.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes.
